name: PowerPoint Roulette by Improv Lore
description:
PowerPoint Roulette is a fast-paced, creative show where improvisers deliver presentations from slides they’ve never seen before. Each performer is faced with slides filled with bizarre graphs, meaningless acronyms, and unexpected themes. With no time to prepare, they must improvise convincing explanations, facts, stories, and insights on the spot.

Serious business pitches, heartfelt eulogies, hard-hitting TED Talks, and fanciful conspiracy theories - prepare yourselves for a night of ‘official’ fun! The audience gets to join the revelry by asking questions, creating a truly unpredictable night of improvised theatrics.

About Improv Lore:

We are a Bengaluru-based community theatre troupe, working towards spreading the art of spontaneous storytelling and unscripted stagecraft, and rekindling the joy of being playful and whimsical. We meet for jams and workshops.
